# Seismic Modeling

**Summary**: Simulating seismic responses from geological models to predict how subsurface features appear in seismic data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024]] performed seismic modeling to demonstrate the influence of bioturbation on seismic signals at high frequencies.

## Key Results and Findings

- Higher vertical resolution (0.1 m) and higher frequency (100 Hz) yielded the most detailed results for synthetic seismograms. ([[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024, p. 65]])
